summary.goal: Add --depth N flag to memex context to limit ancestor chain noise
decisions: Default depth=2: shows at most 2 ancestors in the Ancestor Context section; root (Project Context) is always shown
trim_path() helper slices path[1..len-1] to last `depth` nodes, keeping path[0] (root) and path[last] (target) unconditionally
No changes to generate_markdown/xml/plain — they receive a shorter path and render identically
depth=0 suppresses all ancestors; depth=N>=actual collapses to full output
